prompt: Change the hollow cross in the graph to a heart-shaped hollow space.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Locate the red and black stylized heartbeat (ECG) waveform icon in the top-right section of the infographic. Replace this icon with a hollow heart shape.
objects: Blue and light blue abstract background
Red accent lines/shapes in the background
Blue human silhouette with white internal organs
